name: High-Performance Developer Laptop
description: Request a high-spec laptop for software development, engineering, or data work — more RAM/CPU than the standard business laptop. For developers, engineers, designers needing a powerful machine.

name: Standard Business Laptop
description: Request a standard business laptop for general office work, email, documents, and meetings. The default company laptop for most employees.

name: Desktop Workstation
description: Request a fixed desktop computer/workstation for an office desk. For roles that work primarily from a fixed location.

name: External Monitor
description: Request an external display/monitor/screen for a workstation. For dual-screen setups, larger displays, or replacing a faulty monitor.

name: Memory (RAM) Upgrade
description: Request additional memory/RAM for an existing computer to improve performance and run heavier applications.

name: Storage (SSD) Upgrade
description: Request additional or larger storage/SSD/disk for an existing computer that is running out of space.

name: Docking Station
description: Request a docking station to connect a laptop to monitors, keyboard, and wired network at a desk.

name: Headset
description: Request a headset for calls and meetings — wired or wireless, with microphone. For frequent calls, support roles, or remote meetings.

name: Webcam
description: Request an external webcam/camera for video meetings and conferencing.

name: Keyboard & Mouse Set
description: Request a replacement or additional keyboard and mouse — wired or wireless, ergonomic options available.

name: Microsoft Office License
description: Request a Microsoft Office / Microsoft 365 license — Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook. For new users or upgrading from a free edition.

name: Adobe Creative Cloud License
description: Request Adobe Creative Cloud — Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Premiere. For designers, marketing, and content teams.

name: Developer IDE License
description: Request a developer IDE license — JetBrains (IntelliJ, PyCharm), Visual Studio. For engineers and developers.

name: Project Management Tool Access
description: Request access to the project management / issue tracking tool (Jira). For project members and teams managing work.

name: Design Tool License
description: Request a design/prototyping tool license (Figma, Sketch). For designers and product teams.

name: Endpoint Security / Antivirus
description: Request endpoint security / antivirus software installation on a device for protection and compliance.

name: Database Client License
description: Request a database client tool license (DBeaver Pro, DataGrip, TablePlus) for working with databases.

name: General Software Installation
description: Request installation of a specific software application not in the standard catalog. Provide the name and reason.

name: New User Account Creation
description: Request creation of a new user account / directory (Active Directory) account for a new joiner or contractor.

name: VPN / Remote Access
description: Request secure remote network access (VPN) to connect to internal systems from outside the office. For remote work, work-from-home, or off-network access to internal applications.

name: Database Access
description: Request access to a specific database — read-only or read-write. For analysts, developers, and reporting.

name: Shared Drive / Folder Access
description: Request access to a shared network drive, folder, or SharePoint site.

name: Application Access
description: Request access to a business application or system (CRM, ERP, internal tool). Name the application and role.

name: Privileged / Admin Access
description: Request elevated/privileged/administrator access to a system. Requires strong justification and approval.

name: Source Code Repository Access
description: Request access to a source code repository / GitHub organization or specific repo. For developers and engineers.

name: Cloud Sandbox Environment
description: Request a temporary cloud sandbox / dev environment (AWS, GCP, Azure) for testing and experimentation.

name: New Mailbox / Email Account
description: Request creation of a new email mailbox / email ID for a user or a shared/functional mailbox.

name: Distribution List / Group Email
description: Request a new distribution list or group email address, or changes to membership of an existing one.

name: Mailbox Quota Increase
description: Request an increase to mailbox storage quota for a user whose mailbox is full.

name: Video Conferencing License
description: Request a video conferencing license (Zoom, Teams premium, Webex) for hosting larger or external meetings.

name: Wi-Fi / Network Access
description: Request Wi-Fi or wired network access for a device, guest, or new location.

name: Static IP / Firewall Rule
description: Request a static IP address or a firewall rule change to allow specific connectivity.

name: Corporate Mobile Phone & Plan
description: Request a company mobile phone with a corporate voice and data plan. For roles requiring mobility.

name: Mobile SIM / Data Plan
description: Request a SIM card or mobile data plan for an existing device or hotspot.

name: MFA Enrollment / Reset
description: Request multi-factor authentication (MFA / 2FA) enrollment or reset — e.g. after a lost device or new phone.

name: Password Reset
description: Request a password reset for an account when locked out or forgotten. Self-service where available.

name: Digital Certificate Request
description: Request a digital/SSL certificate for a service, server, or signing.

name: Report an IT Incident
description: Report something broken, failing, or not working — an IT incident. For outages, errors, and faults that need fixing.

name: IT Change Request
description: Request a planned change to IT systems, infrastructure, or configuration — following change management.

name: General IT Service Request
description: A general IT service request that doesn't fit another catalog item. Describe what you need.

name: Employee Offboarding
description: Offboard a departing employee — revoke access, recover assets, disable accounts. The full leaver process.

name: Manpower / Hiring Requisition
description: Raise a hiring requisition to open a new position — headcount approval and recruitment.

name: Internal Transfer Request
description: Request an internal transfer of an employee to another team, department, or location.

name: Leave / Time-Off Request
description: Request leave or time off — vacation, sick leave, personal day. For planned or unplanned absences.

name: ID Card / Access Badge
description: Request a new or replacement employee ID card / access badge for building entry.

name: Employment Verification Letter
description: Request an official employment verification / experience letter — e.g. for a visa, loan, or rental.

name: Training Enrollment
description: Request enrollment in a training course, certification, or learning program.

name: Travel Reimbursement
description: Claim reimbursement for business travel expenses — flights, hotel, transport, meals. Attach receipts.

name: Expense Claim
description: Submit a general business expense claim for reimbursement — supplies, subscriptions, client costs.

name: Procurement / Purchase Order
description: Request a purchase order to procure goods or services from a vendor.

name: Desk / Workspace Allocation
description: Request a desk, seat, or workspace allocation — for a new joiner, move, or hot-desk.

name: Meeting Room / Facility Booking
description: Book a meeting room or facility for an event or meeting.

name: Parking Permit
description: Request a parking permit or assigned parking space at an office location.

name: MFA re-enrollment
description: Re-enroll multi-factor authentication on a new or replacement device. Use when the user has a new phone, lost their old device, or needs to reset their MFA token. Covers SMS, authenticator-app (TOTP), and hardware-token re-binding for any user account.

tasks.name: Revoke prior MFA token from IdP
Send re-enrollment link to user and confirm new device binding
